h1.visual_description: Not present in sample, but inferred as top-level chapter titles based on footer context.

h2.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif, slightly larger than body text, used for major section breaks (inferred from document structure).

h3.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif, same size as body text, used for table headers.

visual_matchers.pattern: Table with light gray header background and alternating white rows; no vertical borders.
Italicized text within standard body paragraphs.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Emphasis on key accounting terms or direct expensing definitions.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number followed by vertical pipe and chapter title at the bottom left of the page (e.g., '42 | Ch. 3. The Federal Tax System').
